SEARCH
Package model.items.equipments

Klasse Headwear

java.lang.Object
model.items.Item
model.items.equipments.Headwear
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Serializable, Equippable
public class Headwear extends Item implements Equippable, Serializable
Represents a headwear item that can be equipped by the player.

Headwear provides defensive stats and is equipped in the head slot.

Seit:
2026
Autor:
Bastian Rentzsch
Siehe auch:
  • Serialisierte Form

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    Headwear(String name, String description, String imagename, Itemtype type, int defense)
    Creates a new headwear item with the specified properties and defense value.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    int
    getDefense()
    Returns the defense value of this headwear.
    EquipmentSlot
    getSlot()
    Returns the equipment slot this headwear belongs to.

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden model.items.Item

    equals, getDescription, getImagename, getName, getType, hashCode

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    getClass, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • Headwear

      public Headwear(String name, String description, String imagename, Itemtype type, int defense)
      Creates a new headwear item with the specified properties and defense value.
      Parameter:
      name - the name of the headwear
      description - the description of the headwear
      imagename - the image name associated with the headwear
      type - the item type
      defense - the defensive value provided by this headwear

  • Methodendetails

    • getDefense

      public int getDefense()
      Returns the defense value of this headwear.
      Gibt zurück:
      the defense value

    • getSlot

      public EquipmentSlot getSlot()
      Returns the equipment slot this headwear belongs to.
      Angegeben von:
      getSlot in Schnittstelle Equippable
      Gibt zurück:
      EquipmentSlot.HEADWEAR
